commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They have dealt treacherously against the LORD: for they have begotten pagan children: now a new moon shall devour them with their heritage. That is, aliens form God: and therefore they are threatened with speedy destruction. (Challoner) Their offspring is rebellious, and deserves no longer to be called my people, chap. Every month the Assyrians shall come upon them; (Chaldean; St. Jerome) or, in the space of one month, they shall perish. (Calmet) Septuagint, "the mildew shall eat them and their portions.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Children that are strangers: That is, aliens from God: and therefore they are threatened with speedy destruction.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
